description:
Pentel PEN Permanent Marker Bullet Point (N50)
SKU: N50
Ink Colour
*
Features
• Bullet point marker
•1.5mm writing width
• Robust aluminium barrels and bonded fibre tips retain their shape
• Will write on almost any surface including cardboard, plastic, metal, wood, glass
• Vivid waterproof ink
• Suitable for industrial use, including surfaces exposed to water and ethanol alcohol
